positive: Minimalist geometric pattern featuring abstract woodland creatures (fox, deer, owl) intertwined with celestial motifs like crescent moons and stars. The style is Nordic folk art meets modern Scandinavian illustration, using thick, clean linework and stylized silhouettes. Palette should be limited to deep forest green, charcoal black, burnt orange, and cream off-white. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centrally balanced, designed to repeat seamlessly on fabric. High contrast, vector-graphic quality, perfect for screen printing, crisp lines, single-color depth.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, noise, fuzzy, dirty, graffiti, logo, signature, copyrighted, cartoonish, realistic photo, 3d render
